title: Greeting Card
description: Ask the user for their name and age using input(). Print a greeting: 'Hello [name]! You are [age] years old. Welcome to Python!'
starterCode:
# Get user info
name = input("Enter your name: ")
age = input("Enter your age: ")

# Print greeting
solution:
name = input("Enter your name: ")
age = input("Enter your age: ")
print(f"Hello {name}! You are {age} years old. Welcome to Python!")

testCases.label: With input Lakshanya 20
testCases.expectedOutput: Enter your name: Enter your age: Hello Lakshanya! You are 20 years old. Welcome to Python!

title: Addition Calculator
description: Ask the user for two numbers. Convert them to integers. Print the sum in the format: '[num1] + [num2] = [sum]'
starterCode:
num1 = int(input("First number: "))
num2 = int(input("Second number: "))

# Calculate and print sum
solution:
num1 = int(input("First number: "))
num2 = int(input("Second number: "))
result = num1 + num2
print(f"{num1} + {num2} = {result}")
